title: crataegus monogyna f. semperflorens
intro: Crataegus monogyna f. semperflorens, also known as the evergreen hawthorn, is a variety of the hawthorn tree (Crataegus monogyna) that is characterized by its continuous blooming habit and larger leaves. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and cardiovascular-protective effects, which can be attributed to its high content of flavonoids, phenolic acids, and oligomeric proanthocyanidins. The health benefits of Crataegus monogyna f. semperflorens include lowering blood pressure, improving lipid profiles, and reducing the risk of cardiovascular disease. The herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, tinctures, and capsules, which are often used to support heart health and alleviate symptoms of hypertension, anxiety, and insomnia.
